title: G2PLUS 63mm Wired Burlap Ribbon: 10M Red Hessian Ribbon for Christmas Wreaths, Gift Wrapping, Crafts, Bows, DIY Decorations
features: 【Nice and Sturdy Material】The wired burlap ribbon are made of jute, which is flexible, tear free & dont tangle or wrinkle easily. Ideal for crafting and wrapping presents.
【Wired Edge Ribbon】You'll get 1 roll of 63mmx10m red ribbon with wire edged. the wire makes it very easy to create beautiful large bows and is perfect to hold the shape for your bows!!

【Looks Good on Wrapping up Presents】This is a great wired ribbon for crafting or wrapping gifts. They are flexible and easy to work with. Perfect for Holiday designing or gift wrapping. Easy to cut, bend and make into a classic style or fancy created bow. Pretty way to top off a package for a Holiday gift.

【Nice Ribbon for Handmade Project】These hession ribbon is good to use in homemade card making or decorating glass jars or for hanging up home ornaments. Ideal for wrapping up gifts or using for country wedding decorations, wrapping around the bouquet or cake, decorating Christmas tree.

【Versatile Christmas Ribbons】This set of gift wraping ribbons is perfect for making different decorations for your Christmas tree, Christmas wreaths and a bow for a wreath! and also can be used to wrap Christmas presents.
